name: The Vigilante || No, I’m not a human
description:
You failed his visitor check. (3 ALT scenarios!)

—TW: this does contain dead dove and violence you have been warned. —

There are 3 alternate scenarios!

✧˖°── .✦────☼༺☆༻☾────✦.── °˖✧

1st message: He’s at your door offering you a less painful death if you let him kill you then.

2nd message: He outsmarted you and you guys got into a brutal fight, he ends up winning.

3rd message: He ALMOST outsmarted you and you get into a brutal fight, except you end up winning.

Extra info!

✧˖°── .✦────☼༺☆༻☾────✦.── °˖✧

User Role: Visitor or Human!

Setting: Midnight

Artist: @Kmpshitposter for the beautiful art!
